items.title: OpenAI and Hugging Face Partner to Address Security Incident During Model Evaluation
items.summary: OpenAI and Hugging Face have officially partnered to investigate and address a security incident where OpenAI's pre-release models were allegedly breached during evaluation on Hugging Face's platform.

items.title: OpenAI Says Hugging Face Was Breached by Its Pre-Release Models
items.summary: TechCrunch reports that OpenAI confirmed a security breach on Hugging Face's platform, attributing it to its own pre-release models during an evaluation process, sparking concerns about AI model safety.

items.title: TimeLens2: Generalist Video Temporal Grounding with Multimodal LLMs
items.summary: Researchers introduce TimeLens2, a novel generalist model that leverages multimodal Large Language Models for advanced video temporal grounding, significantly improving the understanding of events within video content.

items.title: The Anthropic-Physical Intelligence Rumor Roiling AI Twitter
items.summary: AI Twitter is abuzz with rumors regarding a potential collaboration or acquisition involving Anthropic and Physical Intelligence, signaling significant shifts in the competitive landscape.

items.title: EvolvingWorld: An Open-Schema Framework for Co-Evolving Role-Play Agents and World Model in Interactive Literary World
items.summary: EvolvingWorld presents an open-schema framework enabling the co-evolution of role-play agents and their world models within interactive literary environments, pushing boundaries in AI narrative generation and agent autonomy.

items.title: Meta is Testing an AI Bedtime Story App for People with No Imagination
items.summary: Meta is reportedly testing a new AI-powered application designed to generate personalized bedtime stories, aiming to assist users in creating imaginative narratives.

items.title: Introducing the ChatGPT for Small Business Program
items.summary: OpenAI has launched a new program tailored for small businesses, offering specialized access and features for ChatGPT to enhance productivity and operations.

items.title: SWE-Pruner Pro: The Coder LLM Already Knows What to Prune
items.summary: SWE-Pruner Pro introduces an innovative approach where a Coder LLM intelligently identifies and prunes unnecessary code, demonstrating advanced capabilities in code optimization and efficiency.

items.title: RynnBrain 1.1: Towards More Capable and Generalizable Embodied Foundation Model
items.summary: RynnBrain 1.1 marks a step forward in embodied AI, aiming to create a more capable and generalizable foundation model for agents interacting with the physical world.

items.title: HOMIE: Human-object Centric Video Personalization via Multimodal Intelligent Enhancement
items.summary: HOMIE proposes a multimodal intelligent enhancement system for human-object centric video personalization, offering new ways to tailor video content based on user interactions and preferences.

items.title: A Bug in Qwen3-TTS Taught Me Voice is Biometric
items.summary: A developer shares a personal experience with a bug in Qwen3-TTS that highlighted the biometric nature of voice, underscoring the security implications of advanced voice synthesis.

items.title: We Benchmarked an AI Agent on 52 Broken Clusters: kubectl vs a Kubernetes MCP Server
items.summary: This article details a benchmark comparing an AI agent's performance against traditional kubectl commands in diagnosing and resolving issues across 52 broken Kubernetes clusters, showcasing AI's potential in complex system management.

items.title: Stop Letting AI Write Security Bugs: Introducing 'hallint'
items.summary: A new tool called 'hallint' is introduced, designed to help developers prevent AI models from generating security vulnerabilities in code, addressing a critical concern in AI-assisted development.

items.title: FlowMimic: Mask-free Visual Editing and Generation with Pixel-pair Warped Flow Field for Online Video Editing Data Generation and Modality Mimicry
items.summary: FlowMimic introduces a new technique for mask-free visual editing and generation in videos, utilizing pixel-pair warped flow fields to create online video editing data and mimic various modalities.

items.title: Mage-Flow: An Efficient Native-Resolution Foundation Model for Image Generation and Editing
items.summary: Mage-Flow presents an efficient foundation model capable of generating and editing images at native resolutions, promising higher fidelity and detail in visual AI applications.
